response:
Here is a car accident report in exactly 3 bullet points:

• **Incident Details**: On [Date] at approximately [Time], a collision occurred between two vehicles on [Location]. The incident involved a [Make and Model] driven by [Driver's Name] and a [Make and Model] driven by [Driver's Name of other vehicle].

• **Accident Description**: The vehicles were traveling in opposite directions when they collided, resulting in damage to both vehicles. The [Make and Model] sustained [type of damage, e.g. front end damage] and the [Make and Model] sustained [type of damage, e.g. rear end damage]. No injuries were reported.

• **Investigation**: The accident was investigated by [Name of Investigator] and the following evidence was collected: [list any evidence collected, e.g. photos of the vehicles, witness statements, police report]. The incident is currently under review and further investigation is pending.
